changedFiles.reason: Defined the release-preparation boundary and exact-SHA publication handoff.
Recorded candidate evidence and release verification.
Regenerated governed cockpit status.
Regenerated candidate SBOM for the pending release preparation.
Regenerated candidate provenance with the pending release tag.
Regenerated candidate artifact digest manifest.
Updated the low-risk Bandit baseline for the reviewed pending-tag fallback implementation.
Raised the measured Python line baseline by 20 to accommodate reviewed release-preparation synchronization and the explicit pending-tag source fallback without weakening the check.
Advanced the canonical pending release tag to v0.5.28 and updated candidate evidence digests.
Advanced the installer default ref and usage text to v0.5.28.
Updated release distribution fixtures for the pending v0.5.28 preparation flow.
Made supply-chain tests use the declared pending tag and explicit candidate source identity.
Allows local candidate checks to resolve the latest existing immutable tag while the next tag is pending publication; explicit release workflow source SHAs remain authoritative.
Updated adoption evidence expectation to the current release metadata.
Updated the current release example for adopters.
Clarified candidate evidence versus final public release proof.
Kept Japanese distribution guidance aligned with the evidence boundary.
Kept the historical design plan version-neutral as the current release advances.
Kept the historical design specification version-neutral as the current release advances.
Generated archive discovery index.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not rewrite or move historical release evidence.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Only the pending release declaration and candidate baselines changed; v0.5.27 is not modified.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Keep release metadata, generated evidence, and the immutable tag internally consistent.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Supply-chain commands regenerated SBOM, provenance, and release-digests; release.json digests were updated to their file hashes.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Treat the release tag as public only after the release workflow succeeds.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: The release-preparation distribution check runs with AI_RELEASE_PREPARATION=1 and the final publication is deferred to post-merge exact-SHA workflow dispatch.

risk.detail: v0.5.28 remains pending until the merged main SHA passes smoke and compatibility checks in release.yml; candidate provenance is not final public release proof.

residualRisks.detail: The public v0.5.28 tag and release assets do not exist until the exact-SHA post-merge workflow succeeds.

reviewReadiness.reason: All required verification passed; residual risk remains documented.
expectedReviewFocus: Confirm v0.5.28 publication is deferred to release.yml with the merged main SHA.

userCorrectionsCaptured: User required the new version release to remain last in the remediation loop.
userCorrectionSolidification: No tag or GitHub Release is created by this preparation Work Item before its PR merges.

checkpointEvidence.detail: Release Contract was enriched and checkpoint passed before changing release files.
Final checkpoint was executed before finish after release metadata, evidence, documentation, and regression updates were complete.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: release metadata and installer default agree on v0.5.28
candidate evidence digests are internally consistent
public v0.5.27 remains historical while v0.5.28 is pending
evidence: Public tag discovery reports v0.5.27 as highest public tag; preparation mode accepts exactly the next patch.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: post-merge exact-SHA workflow is the only publication path

knownGaps: Final source-bound release assets and public tag are generated only after the preparation PR merges and release.yml is dispatched.

intentAlignment.rationaleValidated: The pending release is reviewable as one metadata/evidence unit, while immutable publication remains an exact-SHA post-merge action.

overclaimPrevention: Do not report v0.5.28 as publicly released until release.yml creates the tag and GitHub Release successfully.
